description_for_human: Control robots using Vision-Language-Action AI. Send natural language commands, manage swarms, and integrate IoT sensors for intelligent automation.
description_for_model: Plugin for controlling robots via the NWO Robotics API. Supports natural language commands, multi-agent swarms, IoT sensor fusion, task planning, and learning-based recommendations. All robot control commands require user confirmation before execution.

endpoints.name: robotics_inference
endpoints.description: Send VLA inference requests to control robots

endpoints.name: agent_payment
endpoints.description: Process ETH payment for tier upgrade

endpoints.name: simulation
endpoints.description: Trajectory validation, collision detection, motion planning

endpoints.description: Generate synthetic training scenes with Cosmos

endpoints.description: Create datasets and start fine-tuning jobs

endpoints.name: tactile_sensing
endpoints.description: Process tactile sensor data and slip detection

endpoints.name: task_management
endpoints.description: List tasks and view execution history

endpoints.name: safety_checks
endpoints.description: Run safety validation and send alerts

endpoints.name: code_templates
endpoints.description: Get code templates for common tasks
